calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-09-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-06-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2025 Set For Trial On Jun-22-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jul-23-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ZEN COMPOUND, LLC DBA TEMPLE SF NIGHT CLUB's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND.

Defendant's motion to vacate the default entered on October 7, 2024, and default judgment entered on December 20, 2024, is granted.

The motion is timely as it was filed within "six months after entry of judgment." (CCP 473(b).) The Rennie declaration sufficiently demonstrates that attorney fault/neglect caused entry of the default and default judgment and relief is mandatory in such circumstances. There is a strong policy to hear cases on the merits. (Slusher v. Durrer (1977) 69 Cal.App.3d 747, 753.) Defendant also provides a proposed answer.

Pursuant to CCP 473(c)(1)(C), defense counsel Rennie shall remit $9.906.25 in fees and costs to plaintiff as reasonable fees and costs for procuring and enforcing the default judgment. Payment to be made by August 29, 2025.

Defendant to file the proposed answer by July 30, 2025.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2025 Off Calendar

Declaration Of Alonzo Brantley In Support Of Default Judgement
Off Calendar Dec-20-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:35 am and concluding at 9:49 am.

Plaintiff Alonzo Brantley is present, represented by Isaac Safier, Esq., via zoom video confrence, is placed under oaht and testifies.
Defendant Zen Compound LLC, DBA Temple SF Night Club not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

The Court Finds:
1. The complaint filed April 24, 2024 is the operative pleading.
2. The complaint was served upon Defendants on May 08, 2024.
3. The statment of damages was served upon Defendants on August 19, 2024.
4. The Court takes Judicial Notice of the Acknowledgment and Reciept of the Statment of Damages
5. Doe Defendants were Dismissed on October 7, 2024.
6. Default entered on October 7, 2024.
7. The ammount requested will resolve the entire action.

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Alonzo Brantley, and against Defendant Zen Compound LLC, DBA Temple SF Night Club, as follows:

1. Damages: $113,694.89
2. Prejudgment Interest: $0
3. Costs: $548.35
4. Attorney fees: $0

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $114,243.24

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)
